What We Make

Precision Components
for Every Cookware Format

We manufacture the functional components that cookware brands assemble into finished products — not finished cookware, but the precision-formed parts that make cookware work.

Induction Base Plates
SS 430 stainless discs bonded to aluminium/non-stick cookware bases. Delivers magnetic compatibility and uniform heat spread across all induction hob standards.
100–220mm · 6 patterns · Custom emboss available
Pressure Cooker Lids & Bases
High-strength stamped components engineered to handle pressure and temperature differentials. Flat, dome, and embossed profiles available to spec.
Custom dia · SS 304/430 · Rim-formed
Perforated Steamer Plates
Precision-perforated trays for idli makers, dhokla steamers, and multi-tier cooker inserts. Uniform hole pattern, consistent cavity geometry, stackable format.
Idli / Dhokla / Custom tray formats
Deep Drawn Bowls & Vessels
Controlled deep-draw forming of round stainless steel into precise 3D cavity geometries — pots, vessels, inner liners, and housings for OEM applications.
Multi-tonnage · Tight tolerances
Stamped SS Discs & Blanks
High-volume blanking and precision cutting to exact diameters. Flat stainless steel discs for OEM assembly, filter applications, and component sub-assemblies.
Any diameter · High-volume runs
Custom Embossed Components
Pattern, logo, groove, and texture embossing on plates and lids. Full in-house tooling — your design, your spec, produced to volume without third-party toolmakers.
In-house tooling · Logo emboss · Custom patterns

Core Product

Induction Base
Plate Range

The invisible component that makes modern cookware induction-compatible. Our SS 430 plates are the industry standard for magnetic permeability, bond strength, and heat distribution geometry.

MaterialStainless Steel SS 430
Diameter Range100 mm to 220 mm+
Thickness0.4 mm to 0.6 mm
Surface FinishMill / Brushed / Embossed
Induction StdAll hob compatible
Bond TypeWeld-ready / Press-bond
MOQOn request — all sizes
Custom Diameter Edge Profile Center Hole Logo Emboss Dot Pattern Groove Pattern Plain Radial Design
Manufacturing

In-House Capability.
No Third-Party Dependency.

From blank to finished component — every process stage under our roof. Faster development cycles, tighter quality control, lower tooling costs for OEM customers.

01
Deep Draw
Multiple tonnage configurations. Controlled forming of round components into precise 3D cavity geometries. 100mm to 220mm+ diameter. Used for pressure cooker bodies and inner liners.
02
Hydraulic Press
High-force presses for controlled blank-holder force and consistent draw depth at volume. Critical for induction plate bonding geometry and lid dome forming at production scale.
03
Power Press / Blanking
High-speed mechanical presses for precision cutting and blanking. Exact diameter output with consistent edge profiles. Scaled for large-batch OEM programs with minimal deviation.
04
Embossing
Dedicated tooling for pattern, groove, dot, and logo embossing. In-house die and tool development — no external toolmaker required. Prototyped and approved before bulk production.
01
Requirement
Drawings / samples / specs
→
02
In-house Tooling
Die & tool development
→
03

Why Jagruti

The Manufacturer
Behind the Brands

We don't sell cookware. We manufacture the functional components that cookware brands assemble into finished products. When a consumer uses an induction pan, they're using our components — they just don't know our name.

That's the OEM model — and it's what we've done since 1974.

Long-term Client Reference
TTK Prestige
India's leading pressure cooker and cookware brand. We have supplied precision components to TTK Prestige across multiple product lines over a sustained multi-year relationship.
01
In-House Tooling — Full Control
Complete die and tooling design and fabrication on-site. Faster development cycles, lower cost, tighter dimensional control. No external toolmaker delays.
02
Bulk Production Capacity at OEM Scale
Scaled for high-volume programs. Multiple press configurations running in parallel. Consistent output quality across large batch runs with reliable delivery timelines.
03
Multi-Stage Quality Protocol
Dimensional, surface, and functional checks at every production stage. Components verified before despatch — not inspected randomly at the end.
04
50 Years of Cookware Component Knowledge
Institutional manufacturing intelligence built over five decades. When a new cookware format requires a new induction disc geometry — we've seen it before, or we develop it faster.
05
Mumbai Base — Fast Domestic & Export Logistics
Road connectivity to JNPT port for export. Domestic freight covers Gujarat, Tamil Nadu, Punjab, and UP cookware clusters within 24–48 hours.
Applications

Every Cookware Format.
One Supplier.

Our components integrate across the full range of aluminium, non-stick, and stainless steel cookware formats — wherever induction compatibility or precision stamped components are required.

Large-diameter base plates for maximum induction contact surface
